problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: If Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
